productDisplayName: Reebok Men Pro Legacy Brown Casual Shoes
description: A perfect shoe for your casual wardrobe, the reebok Pro Legacy comes with a suede-styled upper in a classic tone that makes it a fab buy.UpperTwo tone leather upper for styleLacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue and collar for snug fit Perforations on the medial midfoot for enhanced breathabilityPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for a cushioned ride OutsoleTPR outsole with hexagonal lugs for absolute grip and tractionPivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movementShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
